description: Patches rc.2 with Gemini CLI 0.40.x template compatibility fixes (#224). No new migrations.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(cli): Gemini CLI 0.40.x template compat (#224). Drop `tools:` line from `.gemini/agents/devflow-{check,implement,research}.md` (sub-agent inherits parent tools). Hook event `UserPromptSubmit` → `BeforeAgent` in `.gemini/settings.json`. Shared skills moved from `.gemini/skills/` to `.agents/skills/`.
- fix(cli): `inject-workflow-state.py` branches `hookEventName` per platform via `_detect_platform()` — `BeforeAgent` for Gemini, `UserPromptSubmit` otherwise.
- fix(cli): `needsCodexUpgrade()` narrowed to Codex-only command-as-skill markers `.agents/skills/devflow-{continue,finish-work}/SKILL.md`. Previous broad match auto-installed Codex on `devflow update` for Gemini-only projects.
notes: RC install: `npm install -g @enpd/devflow@rc`. Existing Gemini installs: re-run `devflow init --gemini` or delete `.gemini/skills/` manually.
